channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Building materials such as timber left in the park behind the gate of one of the houses., 1st June
item.description:
Been there for a 2-3 weeks at least. Inbetween the rear fence of approx No 9 or 11 Clyde Crescent and the hedging in the park.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Clyde Crescent, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 1st June
item.description:
CW Pothole 700mm x 400mm x 41mm Temporary Closure 15min db TM Outside number 8 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 1st June
item.description:

item.title: Lack of grass cutting, path maintenance, strimming, weed killer and road sweeping, 1st June
item.description:
All of Henley road, all Springbank.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Henley Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 1st June
item.description:
Tree appears to be in poor condition, please inspect health of Tree
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 1st June
item.description:
